body.purpose: Default UI copy and scorecard lines.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Color transitions on buttons and inputs.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call to action: create match, start scoring, unlock.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--primary, #2d6b3a); color: var(--primary-foreground, #f7faf7); padding: 16px 24px; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 12px; min-height: 48px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #245a2f; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--primary, #2d6b3a); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ball Pad Button
components.description: Run scoring button on the ball pad grid.
components.css: .ds-btn-ball { background: var(--surface, #fff); color: var(--foreground, #1a2e1c); border: 1px solid var(--border, #d4dfd5); padding: 12px 8px; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 12px; min-height: 48px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ball:hover { background: var(--surface-muted, #eef3ee); } .ds-btn-ball:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--primary, #2d6b3a); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Team names, player names, PIN entry.
components.css: .ds-input { background: var(--surface, #fff); color: var(--foreground, #1a2e1c); border: 1px solid var(--border, #d4dfd5); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 1rem; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted, #4a5f4d); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--primary, #2d6b3a); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: A scorer at mid-wicket needs numbers first, buttons second, decoration never. Flat surfaces, pitch-green accents, and contrast for outdoor glare.
keyCharacteristics: Flat elevation with borders, not shadows

rules.name: The Score First Rule
rules.body: Primary green appears only on actions that move the match forward.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Product UI uses fixed rem sizes, not fluid clamp headings.

dos: Do keep the live score the largest element on the match screen
Do use semantic tokens not raw Tailwind grays
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on button press feedback
donts: Don't use uppercase tracked section eyebrows
Don't stack identical bordered cards when dividers suffice
Don't ship modals without focus trap and Escape handling
